title: The Key to Loki’s Chains
description: On pages 13–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Shamrock, Giants as Luffy, Zoro, and Nami push toward freeing Loki while Scopper Gaban tests them and God’s Knights begin a darker move against Elbaf’s children.
scene: Luffy, Zoro, and Nami push toward freeing Loki while Scopper Gaban tests them and God’s Knights begin a darker move against Elbaf’s children.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The summorning brought my couch too?! Big surprise!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So, this is the land of giants, huh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: EVERY- THING'S HUGE!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I only wanted one person. Why are there two?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's because you're meant to go home, Captain!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I am?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: It's an order from above.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: So that's what it is...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: "I'm not

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I suppose the situation in the Holy Land has gotten dire recently...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: everything started to spiral downhill after the reverie started.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It'd be best for you to hurry back there, Shamrock.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Anyway, why don't you brief us on the current mission?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What are we doing in a non-member nation like this?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Were you visiting Harald's grave or something?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: All right, I get it.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So we just need to NAB those brats and take them back to the Holy Land.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Although, I guess these particular kids are a bit too big to just stuff in a bag or something.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Chi110 /end

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And those without the mark can't pass through the abyss...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that means we'll have to spirit them away by ship... hmph...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: INGRATE...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: With our combined powers...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We could make a game out of this!!

summary: This part advances the Scopper Gaban and Elbaf’s New Threat through 24 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
